headline: How advertising appears on Camp Dream GA
subheadline: Camp Dream GA is designed so advertising supports the business without compromising trust, readability, or sensitive user flows.

sections.title: Where ads may appear
sections.description: Advertising is reserved for compliant resource and content pages. Ads do not appear on admin routes, sensitive form flows, or checkout confirmation experiences.

sections.title: How ads are separated
sections.description: Ads are visually separated from navigation, buttons, and editorial content so they do not feel deceptive or confusing.

sections.title: Editorial independence
sections.description: Resource content is written to be useful first. Advertising placement does not determine which advice or planning information is published.
